title: epipactis × conquensis nothosubsp. amigoi
intro: Epipactis × conquensis nothosubsp. amigoi is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the Orchidaceae family, derived from the cross between Epipactis helleborine and Epipactis microphylla. It is said to have medicinal properties due to its bioactive compounds, although more research is needed to confirm its potential health benefits. In traditional herbal medicine, Epipactis × conquensis nothosubsp. amigoi is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress and inflammation. The plant is not commonly used in modern herbal preparations, but it is occasionally included in traditional herbal remedies, often in the form of tinctures or infusions.
